updates.title: ITR filing deadline for AY 2026-27: July 31, August 31 or October 31? Check which date applies for you
updates.summary: The Income Tax Department has set different ITR filing deadlines for AY 2026-27 based on income source and audit status. Key dates include July 31 for ITR-1/2, August 31 for ITR-3/4 (non-audit) and October 31 for ITR-3/4 (audit). Penalties apply for late filing.
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Reminder + checklist content for users

updates.title: US Fed keeps rates unchanged as policymakers signal tighter policy ahead. What does it mean for Indian stock market?
updates.summary: The Federal Reserve held the federal funds rate at 3.50%-3.75%, addressing inflation concerns from rising energy prices. Officials updated year-end PCE inflation forecasts, hinting at potential rate hike that may impact foreign investment sentiment, particularly in emerging markets like India.

updates.title: US Fed keeps rates unchanged for fourth straight meeting at 3.5%–3.75%: 5 key takeaways

updates.title: Can a retiree claim tax credit on spouse’s fixed deposit? TDS rules explained
updates.summary: Since the interest earned on the deposit is subject to the clubbing provisions, it is not treated as the spouse’s taxable income. Therefore, they are not eligible to furnish the Form 121 declaration.
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this taxation development

updates.title: Debt funds bought before or after 1 April 2023: Know how the tax treatment changes
updates.summary: For debt funds purchased before April 2023, long-term capital gains apply after 24 months and are taxed at 12.5%, while STCG are taxed as per the income slab. For investments made on or after 1 April 2023, all gains are taxed as per the investor's income tax slab. &nbsp;
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this taxation development
